memory.details:
ONMC can optionally call a configured provider:

```bash
onmc llm configure --provider anthropic --model <model-id>
onmc llm status
```

Supported providers:

- Anthropic
- OpenAI
- Mock provider for tests

Secrets are read from environment variables, not stored in config.
